Assignment For Session 7:
The Vital Connection


1. Create your own Vital Connection within your VSL template (comes after your Snap Suggestion section) using the formula below:

The Vital Connection
Modest Introduction Nightmare Story
Transition Into The Big Problem
About "The System"
Results From The System
Final Transition Phrase

Part 1: Modest Introduction
List your credentials and expertise in a modest way by using the "I wasn't always" technique.

Example:  "I wasn't always a bestselling fitness author... and I certainly wasn't always a guy you'd see on the cover of a fitness magazine! …"

Note:  Be sure to review the Tips for the Modest Introduction in the video or transcript so you can see how and where to include an image in your VSL.

Part 2: Transition Into The Big Problem
Begin your transition into Step 3 (The Big Problem) simply by reminding your viewer that you are like them, only you have a "system" (or formula, plan, strategy, blueprint, etc.)

Example:  "Remember, despite my success today, I'm no different than you... I'm just a guy who happened to discover a system..."


Part 3: About "The System"
Here is where you want to insert an image, but not an image of your product, but rather an image that represents the success or benefits your product delivers.

Step 1: On this slide you will want to use an inclusion statement to further connect you to your viewer (deepen the rapport even further).

Example:  
(Image) 
"This is a System (or alternate term) that allows people like us to experience..."

Step 2: Include 2-3 results from using your product/service that are all positive in nature. 

Example:  
"…"Live a life free from the burdens of endless weight gain..." "Enjoy the freedom of eating foods we enjoy and still losing weight..." 

"And experiencing the excitement of seeing the body of our dreams in the bathroom mirror! ..."

Note: Be sure to review the video or transcript to understand the wordsmithing techniques used in this section.

Part 4: Results Of "The System"
Here you personalize, then share the experience of the results you've experienced using this System, tying the reader back into the equation at the end.

Example:  "This is the same system that's allowed me to effortlessly drop 78 pounds of blubber and keep it off for more than a decade..."

"And it's the same exact System I'll be sharing with you today so you can finally see the results you desire, too!"

Part 5: Final Transition Phrase
This is a direct lead-in to The Big Problem that also opens another loop.

Example: 

"And, I'll share all the specifics of this System with you in just a moment... First, I must tell you about the real problem we face..."

"This is the hidden foe behind why you are gaining weight in the first place... and most people have no idea that it's not their fault!"
